g.text: Public: prime p and generator g (known to all)
A, B, g, p — not a or b

svg.text: (g^b)^a mod p = (g^a)^b mod p = g^(ab) mod p
Both arrive at the same value S — the shared secret

g.text: Never transmitted — computed independently by each side
S is hashed (e.g. SHA-256) to produce the session identifier H
